_meta.description: Curated iFIT cycling series for the NordicTrack X24. Tagged by tier and phase-appropriate range. Episode counts are approximate — use the app to mark episodes done manually.

series.name: Moab Beginner Series
series.focus: Scenic red rock terrain. Steady pace, no pressure. Good first series.

series.name: Chilean Adventure Series
series.focus: Scenic South American landscapes. Low resistance, conversational pace.

series.name: Italy Weight Loss Cycle Series
series.focus: Italian landscapes with steady fat-burning effort. Gentle and consistent.

series.name: Hawaiian Island Cycling for Weight Loss Series
series.focus: Ride through Hawaii at an easy endurance pace. Scenic and approachable.

series.name: Sun Valley Beginner Cycle Series
series.focus: Idaho mountain scenery, gentle pace. Short and beginner-friendly.

series.name: Trails to Trees Part 1: Colorado National Park
series.focus: Colorado park riding with Paulo. Part 1 of a two-series progression.

series.name: Trails to Trees Part 2: Glacier, Yellowstone & Grand Teton
series.focus: Three iconic parks. Natural continuation from Part 1 — more terrain, same guide.

series.name: Montana Intro to Cycling
series.focus: Big Sky country at a beginner pace. Gentle introduction to structured riding.

series.name: Turkey Endurance Series
series.focus: 18 rides through Turkey. Cardiorespiratory stamina focus with varied terrain.

series.name: Patagonia Cycling Series
series.focus: Wild Patagonian terrain. Endurance-focused with some climbing mixed in.

series.name: Moab Road Rides
series.focus: Structured road riding on iconic Utah routes. Real progression in resistance and duration.

series.name: Mediterranean Threshold Power Ride Series
series.focus: Threshold-focused power work through Mediterranean scenery. Structured and challenging.

series.name: Olympic National Park Coastal Feel-Good Cycling Series
series.focus: PNW coastal riding with Ashley. Feel-good effort, beautiful scenery.

series.name: NorCal High Intensity Cycling Series
series.focus: Northern California terrain with real intensity. Yuri pushes hard.

series.name: Redwoods Progressive Endurance Cycling Series
series.focus: Endurance progression through the redwoods. Each ride builds on the last.

series.name: Bike the Rockies Part 3: Jasper National Park
series.focus: Canadian Rockies riding. Stunning and demanding — a worthy capstone series.
